ai_summary: Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited (ABREL) has announced its 129th Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held virtually on July 27, 2026, along with a proposed dividend of Rs. 2.50 per equity share for FY2025-26, payable on or after July 30, 2026 if approved. This intimation ensures all shareholders, particularly those without registered email addresses, are provided web links and QR codes to access the AGM notice and Integrated Annual Report, fulfilling regulatory disclosure requirements. The document outlines standard corporate governance procedures with key dates for dividend record, payout, and e-voting, and presents no apparent red flags.
